# Ministerial Order on Programme Review — 2019

Article 7: "All higher education institutions shall conduct internal programme
reviews on a five-year cycle."
[verified-phrase boundary: up to and including "five-year cycle" — remainder
of Article 7 not yet verified against official gazette text]

Surrounding decree context (unverified): The article continues to specify that
review panels must include at least two external experts from outside the
institution and one industry representative with relevant sectoral experience.
